task: Create a JSON configuration to define an AWS Lambda function that processes DynamoDB stream events
solution_criteria: Configuration must include runtime, handler, IAM role, and basic event source mapping for DynamoDB

task: Write a Python function to extract specific tags from an AWS EC2 instance using boto3
solution_criteria: Function should take instance ID as input and return a dictionary of tags, handling potential exceptions

task: Develop a regex pattern to validate AWS resource names (e.g., S3 bucket names or IAM role names)
solution_criteria: Regex must enforce AWS naming conventions like lowercase, no consecutive hyphens, start/end with alphanumeric characters
